description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named development-release that triggers on push to the master branch, excluding tags. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: delete_previous_release to delete the previous release, draft_release to create a new draft release, and three build jobs (msys2_64, msys2_32, and flatpak) that create and upload release assets for Windows 64-bit, Windows 32-bit, and Flatpak, respectively.
